enchantment.arsenal.reeling.desc: Using the Anchorblade will no longer knock back entities but instead reel you or the hit entity in like a grapple.
enchantment.arsenal.spewing.desc: Using the Scythe will spew out a blood blade damaging you and transferring half the duration of your potion effects to any entity hit.
tooltip.arsenal.anchorblade_luxintrus:
Originally designed by Diansu and forged by RAT to be gifted
to Lux in a distant universe, this weapon has seen many worlds.
After this Lux saw her own die, she travelled to another one
to hand it to this new world's Lux. Since then, it has been
passed on for generations, almost as a tradition,
one coral fan growing for every Lux who owned it.
tooltip.arsenal.scythe_clown:
The mother of all Scythes and Arsenal. Originally forged by RAT
on Content SMP, as both a reward and a tool for the job,
this scythe was made for spilling blood, specifically the one shed
during the Easter Slaughter, where RAT and Clown hunted everyone
who hid The Mason's infamous Netherite spawn rate changes.
tooltip.supporter_only:
Cosmetics are reserved to Ko-Fi and YouTube members only.
If you want access to them (and other cool perks), consider supporting!
